---
title: "James Yonge"
---

## James Yonge

**Dates:** (1816-2 Nov 1834)

### Description

cousin of CMY, second and eldest surviving son of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

Known as  'Jemmy Jummy' CMY wrote that he was  'a kind of special patron of mine';  he died at Otterbourne aged 18 [Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 65; tablet in Newton Ferrars church]

### Letters

- Letter from September 11, 1869
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868
- Letter from Friday [17 March 1854]
- Letter from All Saints [1 November 1844[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
